indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is a significant obstacle to setting up a computer workstation, as it takes up a large portion of the space and obstructs access to the window.

indicators.name: lack of flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height, making it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: window
indicators.rationale: The window is too close to the bed, making it difficult to position a computer screen without causing glare or discomfort.

indicators.name: lack of task lighting
indicators.rationale: There is no task lighting available to illuminate the workspace, which is essential for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The presence of a bed and the lack of a flat personal work surface make it challenging to set up a computer workstation. Additionally, the window's proximity to the bed and the absence of task lighting further reduce the suitability of this space for focused solo computer work.
